title: Numeric Correlation Heatmap
objective: Measure linear associations among numeric variables and the binary target.
method: Computed Pearson correlations after replacing physiologically impossible zero cholesterol and blood-pressure values with missing.
results: Strongest absolute numeric-target correlation is thalach at 0.395.
warnings: Missing values and site-level sampling differences may affect all estimates.
Pearson correlation captures only linear pairwise association and ignores site confounding.
